# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata: 
 name: linkerd-authz   # service account for authorization server and gateway services in microservices environment, e.g., "linkerd" or similar names can be used as per the requirement of your setup (e.g.: myapp)
namespace: default    # namespace where resources will reside – this should match what's set on Linkerd Gateway and Server Authorization services in Kubernetes cluster, e.g., "default" or similar names can be used as per the requirement of your setup (e.g.: myapp)
---  
apiVersion: v1    # version for this service account resource to use – it should match what's set on Linkerd Gateway and Server Authorization services in Kubernetes cluster, e.g., "v1" or similar names can be used as per the requirement of your setup (e.g.: myapp)
kind: ServiceAccount   # kind for this service account resource to use – it should match what's set on Linkerd Gateway and Server Authorization services in Kubernetes cluster, e.g., "ServiceAccount" or similar names can be used as per the requirement of your setup (e.g.: myapp)
metadata:    # metadata for this service account resource to use – it should match what's set on Linkerd Gateway and Server Authorization services in Kubernetes cluster, e.g., "linkerd-authz" or similar names can be used as per the requirement of your setup (e.g.: myapp)
name: linkerd   # name for this service account resource to use – it should match what's set on Linkerd Gateway and Server Authorization services in Kubernetes cluster, e.g., "linkerd" or similar names can be used as per the requirement of your setup (e.g.: myapp)
